title: Infiltration Mechanics
description: Successful infiltration requires overlapping trade space with the target. You can only spy on competitors you interact with in some way. This creates natural limits on espionage and encourages market presence.
definition-of-done: Infiltration requires trade space overlap. Overlap calculation based on shared cities/routes. No overlap means no infiltration possible. Overlap visualization available.
testing-plan: Verify infiltration requires overlap. Test overlap calculation. Verify blocked without overlap. Test overlap visualization.
